summary: Fresh matrix recording with generally good sound but occasional source mis‑alignment; the show swings between sloppy moments and hot peaks, highlighted by a solid Shakedown Street.
review: The matrix mix is praised for keeping the tape fresh, though one reviewer notes that the audience and board sources sometimes drift out of sync. Performance-wise the concert is uneven – some passages feel sloppy while others are really hot, with “Shakedown Street” standing out as a highlight. Overall the recording is listenable and the show has its moments despite the inconsistency.

ai_rating.rationale: Two positive ratings (5,4) focus on the matrix quality, while a 3‑star review points to uneven playing; weighted average of show (≈3) and recording (≈4) yields ~3.3.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Generally fresh and clear matrix mix, but some reviewers report the audience and board sources not lining up perfectly in parts of the show.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Inconsistent performance that goes back‑and‑forth from sloppy to pretty hot, with occasional high points.
